description: The global site footer appearing on every page. Contains the AbbVie logo, primary navigation links, social media icons, popular pages, external links, legal/copyright text, and utility navigation links.

layout.structure: Multi-section vertical layout: logo + nav, social icons, popular pages, external links, legal text, utility links

FR-01.title: AbbVie Logo
FR-01.description: The footer MUST display the AbbVie corporate logo.
acceptance: Logo image with alt text 'AbbVie logo'
Not linked (decorative brand element in footer)

FR-02.title: Primary Navigation Links
FR-02.description: The footer MUST display the 5 primary site navigation links.
acceptance: Links: Who We Are, Science, Patients, Join Us, Sustainability
Each link opens in same window
Styled as a horizontal or multi-column list

FR-03.title: Social Media Icons
FR-03.description: The footer MUST display social media profile links with branded icons.
acceptance: 6 social platforms: Facebook, X/Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok
Each link opens in a new window
Icons have alt text (e.g., 'Facebook Logo')
Displayed in a horizontal row

FR-04.title: Popular Pages Section
FR-04.description: The footer MUST display a 'Popular pages' section with commonly accessed links.
acceptance: H2 heading: 'Popular pages'
Links: Pipeline, Products, Partner with Us, Patient Support
Opens in same window

FR-05.title: External Links Section
FR-05.description: The footer MUST display an 'External links' section with off-site resources.
acceptance: H2 heading: 'External links'
Links: News Center, Investors, Contract Manufacturing, Medical Information
Each opens in a new window with external indicator icon

FR-06.title: Legal/Copyright Text
FR-06.description: The footer MUST display trademark and copyright legal text.
acceptance: Trademark notice paragraph
Copyright notice: 'Copyright (c) 2026 AbbVie Inc. North Chicago, Illinois, U.S.A.'
Smaller font size (12-14px)

FR-07.title: Utility Links Bar
FR-07.description: The footer MUST display a utility links bar at the very bottom.
acceptance: Links: Contact Us, Accessibility Statement, Site Map, Terms of Use, Privacy Notice, Consumer Health Data Privacy Notice, Cookie Settings, Your Privacy Choices
Cookie Settings link triggers the cookie preferences dialog
Your Privacy Choices includes the privacy icon image
Horizontal list with separators

FR-08.title: Scroll-to-Top Button
FR-08.description: The footer area MUST include a 'Scroll to top of page' button.
acceptance: Button positioned above the footer content
Scrolls page to top on click
Up arrow icon
Keyboard accessible

FR-09.title: Responsive Layout
FR-09.description: Footer MUST adapt to mobile viewports.
acceptance: Desktop: Multi-column layout for nav and link sections
Mobile: Single column, stacked sections
Social icons remain horizontal at all sizes

accessibility.AC-01: Social media icons MUST have alt text
accessibility.AC-02: External links MUST indicate they open in a new window
accessibility.AC-03: Cookie Settings link MUST trigger the consent dialog accessibly
accessibility.AC-04: Scroll-to-top button MUST have descriptive label
accessibility.AC-05: Footer SHOULD use appropriate ARIA landmark or semantic footer element
